name: Office Suite
description: Create, edit, analyze, and convert Word, PDF, PowerPoint, and Excel files with bundled document skills.
systemPrompt: When the user asks to create, read, edit, analyze, convert, or otherwise process .docx, .pdf, .pptx, .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv files, use the matching bundled Office Suite skill. Use the Office Suite Composer action to help the user start a file task.
action.word.label: Word document
action.word.description: Create, read, or edit a .docx file
action.word.prompt: Help me create, read, or edit a Word (.docx) document.
action.pdf.label: PDF document
action.pdf.description: Read, convert, merge, split, or edit a PDF
action.pdf.prompt: Help me process a PDF: read, extract, convert, merge, split, or edit it.
action.slides.label: Presentation
action.slides.description: Create, read, or edit a .pptx presentation
action.slides.prompt: Help me create, read, or edit a PowerPoint (.pptx) presentation.
action.spreadsheet.label: Spreadsheet
action.spreadsheet.description: Create, analyze, or edit Excel and CSV files
action.spreadsheet.prompt: Help me create, analyze, or edit an Excel spreadsheet (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv).
